turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi. My company's accounts department needs a formal receipt with our company name and GST number on it. Can you issue that?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, we can issue a corporate GST invoice. Could I have the invoice number, your company name and GSTIN?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Invoice SNC-2024-11203. Company is Zenith Tech Solutions. GSTIN is 27AAACZ1234F1Z5.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Got that. I'll pass this to our billing team. The revised invoice with your company name and GSTIN will be emailed within one business day. What email should we use?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Done. GST invoice will go to accounts@zenithtech.in by tomorrow. Anything else?
